message:
feat(membrane,harness): add UAF adversarial detection gate and expand pressure sensor tests

Introduce bd-18qq.4 CVE arena gate that drives 100k deterministic
adversarial allocation probes through the membrane validation pipeline,
verifying zero false negatives in strict mode and correct safe-default
mapping in hardened mode. Also expands the pressure sensor with refined
threshold logic and adds 245 lines of new allocator membrane invariant
sequence tests.

- Add bd18qq4_uaf_adversarial_test.rs: multi-threaded adversarial UAF
  probe harness with structured artifact emission (trace.jsonl,
  uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json, artifact_index.json)
- Expand pressure_sensor.rs with refined threshold calculations
- Expand allocator_membrane_invariants_sequences_test.rs with new
  property-based invariant checks
- Update beads issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
